round1: Alright, Round 1 is in the books, and if you picked Detroit or Ottawa, congratulations, you're officially part of the 'everyone else' club that completely whiffed. At least Mom, Jaclyn, and Stephanie actually remembered the Blues and Penguins were playing, unlike some of you who picked the other team.
round2: Round 2 delivered a swift kick to most, with St. Louis sweeping Dallas in 4 to thoroughly humiliate Marc, Dad, Jaclyn, and Stephanie's predictions. The only bright spot was Mom, who somehow nailed Pittsburgh winning in precisely 7 games, proving even a broken clock is right twice a day.
round3: Round 3 is in the books, and the short series exposed some serious gaps in understanding. Jaclyn, hats off for actually getting New Jersey in 5 games, the only correct game count this round. Marc at least picked both winners, unlike Dad, Mom, and Stephanie, who collectively managed to pick only one correct team out of six total picks. Brutal.
round4: Colorado hoisted the Cup in 7 games. Mom clearly knows her hockey, nailing the Avs in 7, while Dad and Jaclyn's picks for New Jersey were about as effective as a Devils power play.
overall: Well, folks, the 2001 playoffs are in the books, and if you thought last year was exciting, you clearly weren't paying attention to the scoring this time around. Chrissy managed to stumble across the finish line with a paltry 15 points, proving that sometimes you don't have to be good, you just have to be slightly less awful than everyone else, especially after finishing dead last with 17 points just last year. But let's not dwell on mediocrity when true disaster strikes: Derrick, last year's reigning champion with a commanding 53 points, decided to take a year off from reality and scored a goose egg, sharing the bottom of the barrel with Jaclyn who also somehow managed zero points. Marc and Stephanie, with their "lofty" 4 points each, rounded out the podium, confirming that this year's pool was less a competition and more a collective cry for help from participants who clearly forgot how to pick a winner. Seriously, 0 points? Did you even watch the playoffs, or were you just guessing based on uniform colors?
